summary: This document outlines the business model and product strategy for KeepMeCompany, an AI-powered phone agent startup targeting UK GP practices. It details the problem of patient wait times, the solution's features including intake and follow-up calls, team backgrounds, and regulatory certifications like CE Mark and GDPR compliance. Market segmentation and implementation processes for small and large practices are also described.
